title: Cost of Moving Calculator
summary: Small moving-budget calculator with export intent and paid checklist bridge for household moves.

module_manifest.license: See inline content and official references; no ownership lock-ins.
module_manifest.install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/cost-of-moving-calculator/ and paste values into the form, then use Export CSV for reusable results.
module_manifest.first_action: Set move size and distance, run Estimate cost now, then export CSV if you need to pass it to an invoice or spreadsheet.
module_manifest.smoke_test: Call https://dayonebuilder.online/cost-of-moving-calculator/ with the default values and verify a budget range appears.
module_manifest.fallback: If the estimate does not match local market conditions, compare multiple licensed moving providers and consumer finance planning resources before contract.

search_intent_landing_page.trust_notes: Uses official budgeting worksheet references for cost framing; calculator is an estimation helper, not a quote.

trust_evidence: official source links included on landing page
export intent and GA-safe event names
